transcript.text:
Namaste! The Royal Bakery mein aapka swagat hai.  
Would you like to continue in Hindi or English? 
— Kya aap Hindi mein baat karna chahenge ya English mein?
Welcome to The Royal Bakery. I'll be happy to assist you today. Can you please tell me your full name for your order, Sir?

transcript_text:
Hello. Namaste! The Royal Bakery mein aapka swagat hai.  
Would you like to continue in Hindi or English? 
— Kya aap Hindi mein baat karna chahenge ya English mein? English. Welcome to The Royal Bakery. I'll be happy to assist you today. Can you please tell me your full name for your order, Sir?

intake.notes: Customer initiated order, language preference set to English

summary.summary: The caller contacted The Royal Bakery and was greeted by a representative who offered to assist them in either Hindi or English. The caller chose to continue in English and was asked to provide their full name for their order. The outcome is pending as the call has just begun.
